recommendations.title: Signs
recommendations.overview: A family living on a farm finds mysterious crop circles in their fields which suggests something more frightening to come.

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.overview: Following an unexpected tragedy, child psychologist Malcolm Crowe meets a nine year old boy named Cole Sear, who is hiding a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Trap
recommendations.overview: A father and teen daughter attend a pop concert, where they realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event.

recommendations.title: The Village
recommendations.overview: When a willful young man tries to venture beyond his sequestered Pennsylvania hamlet, his actions set off a chain of chilling incidents that will alter the community forever.

recommendations.title: Old
recommendations.overview: A group of families on a tropical holiday discover that the secluded beach where they are staying is somehow causing them to age rapidly – reducing their entire lives into a single day.
